purpose: Industrial Liquid Glass landing page for trust, phone conversion, and mobile call-through

visualLanguage.mood: industrial, technical, dark workshop, precise service
principles: translucent glass panels over industrial surfaces
graphite base with cyan diagnostic light and amber action accents
static mobile UI for speed and comfort

typography.usage: Inter is the only interface font for headings, body text, controls, phone CTAs, and navigation

motion.desktop: hover lift, button glare sweep, subtle hero image breathing, pointer-follow glass highlight
motion.mobile: animations and smooth scrolling disabled at max-width 760px
